METADATA.Keywords: Methanol Production, Syngas, Distillation, Reactor, Compressor
METADATA.Description: Methanol production from purified syngas with H2/CO 2
METADATA.References:
[1] Domingos et al. Techno-economic and environmental analysis of methanol and dimethyl ether production from syngas in a kraft pulp process, https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/pii/S009813542200148X?via%3Dihub;
[2] Tountas, A. A., Peng, X., Tavasoli, A. V., Duchesne, P. N., Dingle, T. L., Dong, Y., ... & Ozin, G. A. (2019). Towards solar methanol: past, present, and future. Advanced Science, 6(8), 1801903. 
[3] Kiss, A.A., Pragt, J., Vos, H., Bargeman, G., De Groot, M., 2016. Novel efficient process for methanol synthesis by CO2 hydrogenation. Chem. Eng. J. 284, 260–269.
[4] https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jcou.2023.102563

EXTERNAL CONNECTORS.DESCRIPTION: Purified syngas feed into the methanol synthesis unit
Net electrical power consumed by the methanol synthesis unit.
Marketable methanol product flow from the methanol synthesis unit
CO2-containing flue gas from purge gas flaring, potentially capturable

MeohProduction.Unit Description: This unit models the production of methanol from purified syngas (H2:CO = 2:1), at a production capacity of 12102.8 kg/h of methanol, with syngas compression from 35 to 90 bar, catalytic methanol synthesis, and distillation purification.
MeohProduction.Connectors Description: Purified syngas is compressed and converted to methanol over a catalyst. The crude methanol is separated by distillation yielding marketable methanol. Purge gas is flared producing CO2-containing flue gas. Electricity is consumed by compressors and the recirculation pump.

Connectors.DESCRIPTION: Net electrical power consumed by the methanol synthesis unit.
Marketable methanol product flow from the methanol synthesis unit
Purified syngas feed (H2:CO = 2:1) into the methanol synthesis unit

FLOW VALUE.formula: =This unit models the production of methanol from purified syngas (H2:CO = 2:1), at a production capacity of 12102.8 kg/h of methanol, with syngas compression from 35 to 90 bar, catalytic methanol synthesis, and distillation purification.inflarestack

Connectors.DESCRIPTION: CO2-containing flue gas from purge gas flaring, potentially capturable

MeohProduction.Heat Streams Description: The syngas is compressed in two stages with intercooling, preheated and fed to the methanol reactor. The reactor exotherm is recovered, crude methanol is flashed and purified by distillation. Purge gas is flared.

Heat Streams.NAME: qt_c111
Heat Streams.DESCRIPTION: Syngas final preheat before methanol reactor inlet

Heat Streams.NAME: qt_h122
Heat Streams.DESCRIPTION: Reactor outlet cooling via feed-effluent heat exchanger

Heat Streams.NAME: qt_h123
Heat Streams.DESCRIPTION: Cooling methanol-rich stream to flash separation conditions

Heat Streams.NAME: qt_h124
Heat Streams.DESCRIPTION: Methanol reactor exothermic reaction heat removal

Heat Streams.NAME: qt_h125
Heat Streams.DESCRIPTION: Distillation column condenser, methanol vapour condensation

Heat Streams.NAME: qt_h126
Heat Streams.DESCRIPTION: Distillation column reboiler, methanol-water mixture vaporisation

Heat Streams.NAME: qt_h128
Heat Streams.DESCRIPTION: Cooling of liquid methanol distillate from condenser temperature to storage

Heat Streams.NAME: qt_h129
Heat Streams.DESCRIPTION: Cooling of liquid bottoms stream from reboiler temperature to storage

Heat Streams.NAME: qt_h130
Heat Streams.DESCRIPTION: Purge gas combustion in flare, isothermal radiation heat release

Heat Streams.NAME: qt_h131
Heat Streams.DESCRIPTION: Flue gas cooling from flare stack outlet to stack discharge temperature

MeohProduction.Equipments Description: Syngas compressors, a methanol synthesis reactor, a feed-effluent heat exchanger, flash separators, a distillation column and a recirculation pump are the main equipment items for cost calculation.
MeohProduction.Operating Cost Description: The fixed and variable operating costs includes manpower, fixed cost of operation, taxes etc.
